LLM Budget Tracker

Wails dashboard shell ready for monthly totals, provider summaries, budgets, and recent sessions.

Loading dashboard data from the shared Go bindings. When no data exists, the shell stays on a deterministic empty state instead of crashing.
Total spend $0.00
Variable spend $0.00
Subscriptions $0.00

Provider summaries

The dashboard binding returns per-provider totals and session counts for this area.

Budgets

Budget cards consume shared monthly rollups and threshold state from Go query services.

Recent sessions

  • Recent CLI sessions will appear here with provider, model, tokens, and spend.
  • If the month is empty, the binding returns empty arrays and zero totals.
